title: Training Coordinator
description: T. Rowe Price, a global leader in investment management, is seeking a Training Coordinator to support employee development across our Atlanta-based and remote teams. You'll design and deliver training programs on compliance, product knowledge, and professional skills. Work remotely while partnering with HR and departments to build a learning culture that drives engagement and career growth.
responsibilities: Coordinate scheduling and logistics for training sessions and workshops
Assist with developing training materials and course content
Track training attendance, completion rates, and learner feedback
Communicate training requirements and deadlines to department managers
Support onboarding and regulatory compliance training programs
Manage learning management system (LMS) and training records

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent professional experience
skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and learning management systems
Basic knowledge of training and development practices

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and mental health coverage
Paid time off and flexible scheduling
